title.description: Option: title shown in the drafting-block at the bottom of the SVG

direction.description: Option: layout direction — right (left→right) or down (top→bottom)

additionalProperties.description: Any additional scalar key is an attribute, rendered as a row in the drafting title block (e.g. author, revision, site)

groups.description: Zones, VLANs, subnets, or other logical boundaries

id.description: Unique identifier — must be unique across all nodes and groups

label.description: Display name; defaults to id when omitted

type.description: Device type — picks the glyph and caption. Platform types vm/container/metal (and aliases like docker, baremetal, server, 'physical server', dedicated) also set the border style: dashed / fine-dotted / double. 'server' means a physical machine and maps to metal; the rack-server glyph is available via host/app/web. 'waf' draws a dedicated shield glyph; 'gpu' (aliases gpu-host, accelerator, cuda) draws a GPU-card glyph with the default border. Canonical values and common aliases are accepted.

icon.description: Explicit glyph override — accepts the same values as type. Visual only: border styling always follows type (e.g. type: metal, icon: db draws the db glyph with the bare-metal double border)

ip.description: Single IP address rendered as 'ip: <value>' on the node

ips.description: One or more IP addresses — each rendered as 'ip: <value>' on the node

os.description: Operating system; rendered as 'os: <value>' on the node

tags.description: Informational labels shown as neutral pills in the node's top-right corner (each pill shows the tag text, max two pills per row). Tags never affect styling — glyph and border style come from type/icon.

additionalProperties.description: Any additional scalar key is rendered as 'key: value' on the node
Any additional scalar key is rendered as 'key: value' inside the info box in the group's lower-right corner

id.description: Unique identifier — must be unique across all nodes and groups

label.description: Display name shown in the group header

class.description: Visual style: zone (orange), vlan (teal), subnet (blue), cloud (purple dashed), onprem (grey), trust (red dashed)

style.description: Visual overrides for the group box (extensible — color and border for now)

color.description: Group color, overriding the class color. A CSS color name from the palette, rendered as a toned-down blueprint tint (fill + border + label).

cidr.description: CIDR notation rendered as 'cidr: <value>' in the info box in the group's lower-right corner (e.g. 10.0.0.0/24)

nodes.description: Node ids that belong directly to this group; each node may belong to at most one group

label.description: Display text shown on the edge in the diagram; connections sharing the same label are drawn in the same colour

protocol.description: Network protocol (e.g. tcp, udp, icmp, vrrp, any)

direction.description: Arrowhead placement: forward (→), both (↔), or none (—)
